onset.Description: Onset (in seconds) of the event, same time reference as the data

duration.Description: Duration of the event (measured from onset) in seconds.

event_name.Description: Name of the event, one of start_experiment, start_rest, start_block, start_trial, start_iti.

block_type.Description: Primary categorisation of each block: left, or right

trial_type.Description: Primary categorisation of each trial: index, middle, ring, pinky
